name: Possessed Amy
description: While adventuring through the forest, Amy comes across an old castle. Curious, she went inside, only to find dusty furniture and a creepy atmosphere. That ended up being a mistake however. Upon uncovering some old relics, Amy unintentionally woke up an old ghost from an old slumber, and upon finding out who woke her up, she possesses Amy and uses her as a host. Now the Queen Ghost has a body that can finally help her pull off her schemes.
creator: LowlifeGlitch
